name: Namespace Badge
description: Color-coded badge for content namespaces: @official (primary/blue), @community (green), and @org:slug (purple). Indicates content provenance and trust level.

standard.description: Standard-sized namespace badge with icon and namespace text.

slots.icon: Namespace icon: shield-check for @official, users for @community, building for @org
slots.label: Namespace text label

compact.description: Small badge with icon only, tooltip shows full namespace. For dense list views.

slots.icon: Namespace icon only, with title attribute for tooltip

pill.description: Pill-shaped badge with background color fill. Prominent display for detail pages.

visual_brief: Small inline badge with a namespace icon and text label. @official renders with a blue/primary background and a shield or checkmark icon. @community renders with a green background and a people/globe icon. @org:slug renders with a purple background and a building icon. The standard preset shows both icon and text. Compact preset shows icon only with a tooltip for the full namespace. Pill preset renders as a rounded-full capsule shape. All variants use white or contrast text on the colored background.

layout_hints.badge_layout: Small inline pill: @ symbol + namespace text. @official gets accent bg with white text. Community namespaces get outlined style with border.

responsive.mobile: Badge renders at standard size. Compact preset preferred in tight layouts to save space.
responsive.tablet: Standard badge with icon and text visible.
responsive.desktop: Full badge with comfortable padding. Pill preset works well inline with other metadata.
